descriptionShort: Abbotsford Pilots defeat expansion Richmond Sockeyes 8-7 in West Coast Junior Hockey League season-opener.
descriptionLong: The Abbotsford Pilots defeated the expansion Richmond Sockeyes 8-7 in a back-and-forth West Coast Junior Hockey League season-opener at MSA Arena. Scott Edwards' powerplay goal at 8:30 of the third period broke a 7-7 tie for Abbotsford. Richmond's Jason Talo recorded four points in the loss, while Todd Geddes earned offensive player of the game honours for the Pilots.
